title: イクノ式友情メソッド

text_block_list.text:
One day, while having lunch at a cafe, I spot
Ikuno Dictus...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Can I join you, Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Of course, feel free.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I've got some tough training after this. I'm
going to need a hearty meal to get through it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hm? Something up?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Please wait a moment. I'll be right back.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: O-okay.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting. Do help yourself to these,
if you'd like.

Ikuno Dictus brings over some salad and side
dishes, then places them in front of Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... What's all this?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I've observed you engaging in some unhealthy
eating habits lately.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I guess I have been a bit lax, now that
you mention it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I believe you're lacking in vitamin B1 and
protein as a result of these habits.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Insufficient consumption of these nutrients is said
to lead to lowered exercise efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So I should eat what you've given me?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Eating these side dishes should resolve your
deficiencies.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
To ensure a long racing career, it is absolutely
vital that you continue to consume the
appropriate amount of these nutrients. Similarly—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat them! And very happily too! Go on! You
should have some too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I'll do just that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Thanks for the food! I feel like I'm all
stocked up on vitamins now.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You won't feel the effects immediately. I believe
it takes some time for you to absorb the nutrients
and—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come on, I was just talking about how I feel. You
don't have to take things so literally.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually, how come you know what I eat on a
daily basis?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You're my friend, so I take notice when I see you
at the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Truthfully, I've wanted to offer you advice on
numerous occasions, but I didn't want to risk
overstepping any boundaries, so...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't worry about that! I appreciate the
honest input. And I'm actually not very good at
managing my nutrient intake... or however you
put it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know! Why don't we eat together a few
times a week? If you don't mind, that is.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to learn more about vitamins and stuff
too.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. If you would tell me which days work
for you and which ones don't, then I can create a
schedule that suits both of our—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Relax. You don't need to be so formal
about it.
